name: Castle of Dreams - Fall
desc: If 3 or more monsters were Special Summoned from your opponent's Deck and/or Extra Deck this turn, while you control a "Castle of Dreams" Field Spell: Your opponent sends cards from their hand or Extra Deck to the GY equal to the number of cards in their GY, then you can place 1 Field Spell from your Deck, GY, or banishment face-up on your field. You can only activate 1 "Castle of Dreams - Fall" per turn.
strings: Opponent sends cards from hand or Extra Deck to GY
Place 1 Field Spell from Deck, GY, or banishment face-up
